input.background: Chapter 17 considered results from the estrogen trial of the Women's Health Initiative study. The incidence of the combined morbidity index in the treatment group was 751 per 8506 (8.83%). The incidence in the control group was 623 of 8102 (7.69%). The test of H0: p1=p2 yielded z_stat=2.66, P=0.0078 (two sided). We propose to test the same information with a chi-square statistic.
input.question: Hypotheses. H0 : no association in source population is equivalent to H0: p1=p2. Ha : association in source population is equivalent to Ha: p1 ≠ p2.

output.answer: H0 : no association in source population is equivalent to H0: p1=p2. Ha : association in source population is equivalent to Ha: p1 ≠ p2.

treatment_cases.description: Number of cases in the treatment group.

treatment_noncases.description: Number of non-cases in the treatment group.

treatment_total.description: Total number of participants in the treatment group.

control_cases.description: Number of cases in the control group.

control_noncases.description: Number of non-cases in the control group.

control_total.description: Total number of participants in the control group.

total_cases.description: Total number of cases in both groups.

total_noncases.description: Total number of non-cases in both groups.

total_participants.description: Total number of participants in both groups.

expected_treatment_cases.description: Expected number of cases in the treatment group under the null hypothesis.

expected_treatment_noncases.description: Expected number of non-cases in the treatment group under the null hypothesis.

expected_control_cases.description: Expected number of cases in the control group under the null hypothesis.

expected_control_noncases.description: Expected number of non-cases in the control group under the null hypothesis.
